---
name: New Template Submission
about: Submit a new template for the AI Prompt Generator
title: '[TEMPLATE] '
labels: template, needs-review
assignees: ''
---

## 📝 Template Name

Provide a clear, descriptive name for your template.

**Example**: "Flutter Firebase CRUD Operations"

## 🎯 Template Category

Which category does this template belong to?

- [ ] Flutter App Development
- [ ] Flutter Game Development
- [ ] Creative Writing
- [ ] Problem-Solving
- [ ] Educational
- [ ] Business & Marketing
- [ ] Programming
- [ ] Other: [specify]

## 📄 Template Content

Please provide your complete template:

```markdown
### [Template Name]

Brief description of what this template does.

**Structure:**
```
[Your template structure here]
```

**Example:**
```
[Concrete example of the template in use]
```

**Customization Options:**
- Option 1: Description
- Option 2: Description

**Notes:**
- Additional notes or warnings
- Best practices
```

## ✅ Use Case Example

Show how this template would be used:

**Input:**
```
User's request for the template
```

**Output:**
```
Generated prompt using the template
```

## 🧪 Testing

**Have you tested this template?**

- [ ] Yes, with ChatGPT
- [ ] Yes, with Claude
- [ ] Yes, with Gemini
- [ ] Yes, with [other AI tool]
- [ ] Not yet

**Test Results:**

Describe the results when you used this template with AI tools:
- Quality of generated responses: [Excellent/Good/Fair/Poor]
- Any issues or edge cases found:
- Any improvements made after testing:

## 📋 Checklist

Please confirm:

- [ ] Template follows the existing format
- [ ] Template is clear and specific
- [ ] Includes a concrete example
- [ ] Tested with at least one AI tool
- [ ] No sensitive or inappropriate content
- [ ] Documentation is complete

## 🎨 Template Quality

Rate your template:

**Clarity**: How clear is the template?
- [ ] Excellent - Very clear and easy to understand
- [ ] Good - Clear with minor ambiguity
- [ ] Fair - Understandable but could be clearer
- [ ] Needs Improvement - Confusing or vague

**Completeness**: How complete is the template?
- [ ] Complete - All necessary sections included
- [ ] Mostly Complete - Minor sections missing
- [ ] Partial - Significant sections missing
- [ ] Incomplete - Major work needed

**Reusability**: How reusable is this template?
- [ ] Highly Reusable - Works for many scenarios
- [ ] Moderately Reusable - Works for several scenarios
- [ ] Limited Reusability - Works for specific cases only
- [ ] One-time Use - Very specific to one scenario

## 🔗 Related Templates

Is this similar to any existing templates?

- [ ] No, this is a new category
- [ ] Yes, it's an improved version of: [template name]
- [ ] Yes, it complements: [template name]

## 📚 Documentation

Have you updated the documentation?

- [ ] Added to README.md
- [ ] Added to appropriate template file
- [ ] Updated examples
- [ ] Added comments in template

## 🤝 Contribution

**Are you planning to:**
- [ ] Submit a pull request
- [ ] Let maintainers implement it
- [ ] Collaborate with maintainers

## 📝 Additional Notes

Any additional information about the template:

- Why you created it
- What problem it solves
- Any limitations
- Future improvements planned

## 🏷️ Labels

Please add relevant labels:
- `template` - Template submission
- `area: flutter-app` - Flutter app template
- `area: flutter-game` - Flutter game template
- `area: creative` - Creative writing template
- `area: technical` - Technical/programming template
- `status: ready-for-review` - Ready for maintainer review
- `status: needs-testing` - Needs more testing

---

**By submitting this template, I confirm that:**
- [ ] I have tested this template with AI tools
- [ ] I have followed the template guidelines
- [ ] This template does not contain inappropriate content
- [ ] I agree to release this template under the MIT license
- [ ] I understand this will be reviewed before merging
